introSection:
Tornado was a Vekoma steel roller coaster previously located at Tokyo Summerland in Akiruno, Tokyo, Japan.

In July 2022, the park announced that Tornado would close on 25 September 2022 along with Wave Swinger.
fullText:
Tornado was a Vekoma steel roller coaster previously located at Tokyo Summerland in Akiruno, Tokyo, Japan.

In July 2022, the park announced that Tornado would close on 25 September 2022 along with Wave Swinger.



White track and supports.




 * Tornado on the parks website (Japanese)
